trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Soraka's Miracle
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
The first 2 times the holder drops below 50% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for 20% of their max Health.

If the holder survives player combat, gain 1 player Health for each Miracle this combat.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Evelynn's Instinct
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
When switching targets, blink to the next target. Attacks and Abilities execute the holder's target below 12% of their Health.

Kills grant the holder 50% Attack Speed decaying over 3 seconds.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Thresh's Lantern
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
After 6 seconds of combat, pull the leftmost benched unit onto the battlefield. While that unit lives, 20% of all damage the holder would take is redirected to them.

Traits of champions flung onto the board do not become active

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Varus's Obsession
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains 3% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.

The Soulmate heals for 20% of damage the holder deals.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: The Indomitable
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
The holder's Move Speed is drastically reduced.

Gain 15% max Health, stun immunity, and pull the current target into melee range.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Lightshield Crest
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Every 3 seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for 70% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for 5 seconds.

On death grants this shield to all allies.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Infinity Force
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Tons of EVERYTHING!

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Ahri's Aura
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
The holder is orbited by 3 foxfires. Each one deals 50 () magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the holder's current target.

For every 20 Mana the holder spends, foxfires travel 5% faster for the rest of combat.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Flickerblades
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Attacks grant 5% stacking Attack Speed. Every 3 attacks also grant 2% Attack Damage and 2% Ability Power.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Yasuo's Bladework
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Every 3 seconds, your next attack is a double attack.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Mogul's Mail
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Grants 1 Armor, 1 Magic Resist, and 5 Health when taking damage, stacking up to 35 times.

At full stacks, grant 1 gold and continue gaining 1 gold every 11 seconds.

Gold generated this game:

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Dawncore
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Reduce the holder's max Mana by 10. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by 10%, to a minimum of 10.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Sniper's Focus
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Gain 40% Damage Amp against targets 4 or more hexes away.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Gambler's Blade
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Grant 1% bonus Attack Speed per gold in your bank (up to 30 gold).

Each attack has a 6% chance to drop 1 gold.

Gold generated this game:

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Statikk Shiv
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Every 3rd attack deals 30 + 50% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Aegis of Dawn
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Every 2.5 seconds, steal 3 Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal % of the holder's Armor.

If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every 1.25 seconds instead.

Healing increases based on Stage.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Titanic Hydra
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Attacks deal 4% of the holder's max Health plus 6% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Fishbones
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Death's Defiance
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
50% of the damage the holder receives is instead dealt over 4 seconds as non-lethal damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Blighting Jewel
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by 6. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder 2 Mana instead.

Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every 0.5 seconds.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Void Gauntlet
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Combat start: Store 30% max Health and 3% more every second. On death, unleash the stored Health as magic damage split between enemies within 4-hexes.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Gold Collector
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Attacks and Abilities execute enemies below 12% of their maximum Health. Executions have a 33% chance to drop 1 gold.

Gold Collected: g
[Unique - only 1 per champion]

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Talisman Of Ascension
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: After 22 seconds gain 100% max Health and 120% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Aegis of Dusk
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Every 2.5 seconds, steal 3 Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal % of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage.

If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every 1.25 seconds instead.

Damage increases based on Stage.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Seeker's Armguard
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Takedowns increase the holder's Armor, Magic Resist, and Ability Power by 20.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Prowler's Claw
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: After killing a target, shed negative effects and dash to the farthest target within 4 hexes. The next 2 critical attacks deal 50% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Silvermere Dawn
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Grants immunity to Stuns and the holder's attacks Stun the target for 0.800000011920929 seconds.

The holder's Attack Speed is locked at 0.5.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Hullcrusher
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Combat Start: If there are no adjacent allies, gain 400 Health, 10% Attack Damage, and 10% Ability Power.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Mittens
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow, Burn, and Wound.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Rapid Firecannon
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Luden's Tempest
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: 100% of overkill damage plus 100 is dealt as magic damage to the two enemies nearest to the target.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Lich Bane
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals bonus magic damage.

Damage increases based on Stage.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Wit's End
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Attacks deal bonus magic damage.

Heals the holder for 30% of all magic damage dealt.

Damage increases based on Stage.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Hellfire Hatchet
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: Attacks deal 3% of the holder's max Health as bonus physical damage. For every 1% missing Health, gain 1% Attack Speed.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Zhonya's Paradox
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Once per combat at 40% Health, become invulnerable and untargetable for 3 seconds.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Eternal Pact
trang_bi_tao_tac.description:
Combat start: Form a pact with the highest Health allied champion, if they die, gain 10 Mana regen and 40% Ability Power.

When the ally uses their ability, gain 15 Mana. Every 6 seconds, shield your ally for 200% of the holder's Ability Power.

trang_bi_tao_tac.name: Cappa Juice
trang_bi_tao_tac.description: The holder dons a Hat on each takedown. The holder gains 1% Attack Damage and Ability Power per Hat. On death lose 20% of all Hats. (Hats: )

cot_loi.name: Gargoyle Stoneplate
cot_loi.description: Gain 10 Armor and 10 Magic Resist for each enemy targeting the holder.

cot_loi.name: Warmog's Armor
cot_loi.description: Gain 18% max Health.

cot_loi.name: Guinsoo's Rageblade
cot_loi.description: Gain 7% stacking Attack Speed every second.

cot_loi.name: Protector's Vow
cot_loi.description:
Combat Start: Gain 20 Mana.

At 40% Health, gain 15 Mana and a Shield equal to 20% max Health.

cot_loi.name: Jeweled Gauntlet
cot_loi.description: Gain Precision.

cot_loi.name: Giant Slayer
cot_loi.description: Gain 15% additional Damage Amp against Tanks.

cot_loi.name: Spirit Visage
cot_loi.description: Regenerate 2% of missing Health each second.

cot_loi.name: Thief's Gloves
cot_loi.description:
Each round: Equip 2 random items.

[Consumes 3 item slots.]

cot_loi.name: Deathblade
cot_loi.description: Perfect peace and calm for the holder - and all who face it.

cot_loi.name: Spear of Shojin
cot_loi.description: Attacks grant 5 bonus Mana.

cot_loi.name: Red Buff
cot_loi.description:
Attacks and Abilities 1% Burn and 33% Wound enemies for 5 seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

cot_loi.name: Rabadon's Deathcap
cot_loi.description: This humble hat can help you make, or unmake, the world itself.

cot_loi.name: Adaptive Helm
cot_loi.description:
Gain an additional 15% Mana from all sources. The holder gains an additional bonus based on their Role:

Tanks and Fighters: Gain 30 Armor and Magic Resistance.

Other Roles: Gain 10% Attack Damage and Ability Power.

cot_loi.name: Infinity Edge
cot_loi.description: Gain Precision.

cot_loi.name: Void Staff
cot_loi.description:
Damage from attacks and Abilities 30% Shred the target for 5 seconds. This effect does not stack.

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

cot_loi.name: Nashor's Tooth
cot_loi.description: Attacks grant 2 bonus Mana, increased to 4 if they critically strike.

cot_loi.name: Striker's Flail
cot_loi.description: Critical Strikes grant 5% Damage Amp for 5 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.

cot_loi.name: Sunfire Cape
cot_loi.description:
Gain 8% max Health.

Every 2 seconds, deal 1% Burn and 33% Wound to an enemy within 2 hexes for 10 seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

cot_loi.name: Last Whisper
cot_loi.description:
Damage from attacks and Abilities 30% Sunder the target for 3 seconds. This effect does not stack.

Sunder: Reduce Armor

cot_loi.name: Bloodthirster
cot_loi.description: Once per combat at 40% Health, gain a 25% max Health Shield that lasts up to 5 seconds.

cot_loi.name: Edge of Night
cot_loi.description: At 60% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal 20% missing health.

cot_loi.name: Crownguard
cot_loi.description:
Combat Start: Gain a 25% max Health Shield for 8 seconds.

When the Shield expires, gain 25% Ability Power.

cot_loi.name: Morellonomicon
cot_loi.description:
Attacks and Abilities deal 1% Burn and 33% Wound to enemies for 10 seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received

cot_loi.name: Kraken's Fury
cot_loi.description: Attacks grant 4% stacking Attack Damage, up to 15 attacks. After 15 attacks, gain 15% Attack Speed.

cot_loi.name: Sterak's Gage
cot_loi.description: At 60% Health, gain a Shield equal to 40% of the wearer's maximum Health that rapidly decays over 4 seconds.

cot_loi.name: Quicksilver
cot_loi.description:
Combat Start: Gain immunity to crowd control for 18 seconds.

Gain 3% stacking Attack Speed every second.

cot_loi.name: Hand Of Justice
cot_loi.description: Gain 2 effects:

cot_loi.name: Hextech Gunblade
cot_loi.description:
Heal the lowest percent Health ally for 20% of damage dealt.

Ally Healing:

cot_loi.name: Steadfast Heart
cot_loi.description: Gain 5% Durability. While above 50% Health, instead gain 15% Durability.

cot_loi.name: Dragon's Claw
cot_loi.description:
Gain 6% max health.

Every 2 seconds, heal 2.5% max Health.

cot_loi.name: Bramble Vest
cot_loi.description:
Gain 6% max health.

Take 5% reduced damage from attacks. When struck by any attack, deal 100 magic damage to all adjacent enemies.

Cooldown: 2 seconds

cot_loi.name: Titan's Resolve
cot_loi.description:
Gain 2% Attack Damage and 2% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to 25 times.

At full stacks, gain 10% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.

cot_loi.name: Blue Buff
cot_loi.description: Gain 10% additional Attack Damage and Ability Power from all sources.

cot_loi.name: Evenshroud
cot_loi.description:
30% Sunder enemies within 2 hexes. Gain 15 Armor and Magic Resist for the first 15 seconds of combat.

Sunder: Reduce Armor

cot_loi.name: Archangel's Staff
cot_loi.description: Combat start: Gain 20% Ability Power every 5 seconds in combat.

cot_loi.name: Ionic Spark
cot_loi.description:
30% Shred enemies within 2 hexes. When enemies cast an Ability, deal magic damage equal to 150% of the Mana spent

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

cot_loi.name: Tactician's Crown
cot_loi.description:
Your team gains +1 max team size.

10% chance to drop 1 gold when you win combat.

"...the Heart of a hero..."

cot_loi.name: Tactician's Cape
cot_loi.description:
Your team gains +1 max team size.

10% chance to drop 1 gold after 10 seconds of combat.

"...and a bit of Luck."

cot_loi.name: Tactician's Shield
cot_loi.description:
Your team gains +1 max team size.

10% chance to drop 1 gold when the holder dies.

"Imbued with a Philosopher's wisdom..."

cot_loi.name: Anomaly
cot_loi.description:
Evolve the holder, granting an effect based on their role.

Tank: Gain 1100 health and grow in size.

Marksman: Gain 75% Attack Speed. On cast, knock back their target if within 3 hexes of them.

Fighter/Assassin: Gain 35 Ability Power & 35% Attack Damage. Triple it when below 85% Health.

Caster: For every 50 Mana spent, throw a 2-hex fireball that deals 5% max Health true damage, 33% Wounds, and 1% Burns for 5 seconds.

Specialist: Gain 6 stars that orbit this champion. Each star deals 70 magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the champion's current target.

cot_loi.name: Drone Uplink
cot_loi.description:
A drone repeats 20% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every 3 seconds.

Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

cot_loi.name: Sympathetic Implant
cot_loi.description:
Every 5 seconds, gain:

Magic Champions: 1 Mana Regen.
Attack Champions: 15% Attack Speed.

Recommended users: Sona and Viktor.

cot_loi.name: Malware Matrix
cot_loi.description:
Attack Champion: Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by 2.

Magic Champion: Dealing magic damage to an enemy reduces the target's Magic Resist by 2.

Recommended users: Master Yi and Pyke.
Ability Damage Cooldown: 0.75 seconds.

cot_loi.name: Target-Lock Optics
cot_loi.description:
When the holder damages each enemy for the first time each combat, gain:

Attack Champions: 9% Attack Damage
Magic Champions: 7% Ability Power

Recommended users: Pyke and Master Yi

cot_loi.name: Biomatter Preserver
cot_loi.description:
Gain % max Health and deploy 3 Life Orbs. Every 8 seconds of combat, one drops restoring 18% of the holder's missing Health.

Recommended user: Gragas.

cot_loi.name: Tentacle Slam
cot_loi.description:
Every 5 seconds, summon a tentacle that slams down on the target, dealing null physical damage and healing the holder for 12% max health.

Illaoi Bonus: If this item is equipped on Illaoi, an additional tentacle slams targets drained by her ability at 35% effectiveness.

Damage increases based on Stage.

cot_loi.name: Broken Prototype
cot_loi.description: Combat start: Gain a 15% max Health shield.

cot_loi.name: Sparking Prototype
cot_loi.description: Every 4 seconds, gain 30% Attack Speed for 4 seconds.

cot_loi.name: Battle Bunny Crossbow
cot_loi.description:
Gain Precision.

Every 4 critical strikes, fire 5 piercing arrows that can critically strike towards the target. Each deals 80% physical damage.


Max 3 stacks per Ability cast.
Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman or Fighter

cot_loi.name: Guiding Hex
cot_loi.description:
Every 3 seconds, fire a bolt at a random enemy in Attack Range, dealing null magic damage.

Aurora Bonus: If this item is equipped on Aurora, she gains 12 Ability Power when the bolt hits.

Damage increases based on Stage.

cot_loi.name: Leaky Prototype
cot_loi.description: Every 5 seconds, this item loses 3 Ability Power and gains 1 Mana Regen.

cot_loi.name: Savage Slicer
cot_loi.description:
Attacks hit the target and all adjacent enemies for 30% of Basic Attack Damage. Omnivamp applies 150% to this damage.

Briar Bonus: If this item is equipped on Briar, on cast this effect happens 15 times.

cot_loi.name: Rocket Swarm
cot_loi.description:
Every 30 Mana spent, fire a barrage of 4 rockets at the target, each dealing 30% physical damage.

Jinx Bonus: If this item is equipped on Jinx, instead replace all ability bullets with rockets that deal 40% increased damage.

cot_loi.name: Radiant Field
cot_loi.description:
Gain 20% max health. Every second, deal magic damage in a 1-hex radius equal to 3% of the holder's max Health. Radius increases every 6 seconds.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

cot_loi.name: Crown of Demacia
cot_loi.description:
If the holder is a Tank, regenerate 3-21% maximum Health every 2 seconds (based on stage). Otherwise, gain 10% Attack Damage and Ability Power every 2 seconds instead.

If the holder of this item dies, you instantly lose the fight.

You can remove this item by benching the holder.

cot_loi.name: Lioness's Lament
cot_loi.description:
Every 15% max health lost, fire crescent projectiles in a line dealing physical damage equal to 50% of the holder's Armor and Magic Resist. Steal 4 Armor and Magic Resist from all enemies hit.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

cot_loi.name: The Annihilator
cot_loi.description:
Store 25% of damage dealt. On death or after 16 seconds in combat, deal the stored damage as true damage to all enemies, reduced by 15% for each hex they are away from the epicenter.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Caster

cot_loi.name: Iceblast Armor
cot_loi.description:
The first time you fall below 70% and 35% health, gain a 25% max health shield for 4 seconds and release a frost nova that stuns enemies within 3 hexes for 2 seconds.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

cot_loi.name: Searing Shortbow
cot_loi.description:
For every 20 mana spent, fire a projectile at a nearby enemy, dealing null + 75% of the holder's Ability Power magic damage and applying 1% Burn and 33% Wound to enemies for 3 seconds.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
Recommended Role: Magic Caster

cot_loi.name: Echoing Batblades
cot_loi.description:
Every 3 attacks, fire 10 batblades split between the 3 nearest enemies. Each blade deals 50% physical damage.

Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

cot_loi.name: Cyclonic Slicers
cot_loi.description:
Gain 3 orbiting razors. Razors deal null magic damage, and 30% Shred and Sunder enemies for 4 seconds. Deal 10% increased damage to Shredded or Sundered enemies.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Fighter

cot_loi.name: UwU Blaster
cot_loi.description:
Every attack, fire 3 laser blasts random targets in range, dealing 40% of the holder's Attack Damage as physical damage.

Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

cot_loi.name: Evolved Embershot
cot_loi.description:
For every 15 mana spent, fire a projectile at a nearby enemy dealing null + 50% of the holder's Ability Power magic damage, and applying 1% Burn and 33% Wound to enemies for 10 seconds.

Each projectile leaves a lingering field that deals null magic damage to enemies each second.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second
Wound: Reduces healing received
Recommended Roles: Magic Caster

cot_loi.name: Animapocalypse
cot_loi.description:
Store 20% of damage dealt. Every 6 seconds and on death, deal the stored damage as true damage to all enemies, reduced by 5% for each hex they are from the epicenter.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Caster

cot_loi.name: OwO Blaster
cot_loi.description:
Every attack, fire 9 laser blasts random targets in range, dealing 40% of the holder's Attack Damage as physical damage.

Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman

cot_loi.name: Deep Freeze
cot_loi.description:
The first time you fall below 90%, 60%, 40%, and 20% health, gain a 20% max health shield for 4 seconds. When this happens, release a frost nova that stuns enemies within 2 hexes for 2 seconds and deals magic damage equal to 15% of their max Health.

The radius increases by 1 each nova.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

cot_loi.name: Solar Eclipse
cot_loi.description:
Gain 18% max Health. Every second, deal magic damage in a 2 hex radius equal to 5% of the holder's max Health, and gain max Health equal to 20% of damage dealt. Radius increases every 6 seconds.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

cot_loi.name: Unceasing Cyclone
cot_loi.description:
Gain 6 orbiting razors. Razors deal null true damage, and 30% Shred and Sunder enemies for the rest of combat. Deal 30% increased damage to Shredded or Sundered enemies.

Damage increases based on Stage.
Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Fighter

cot_loi.name: Vayne's Chromablades
cot_loi.description:
Every 5 attacks, fire 30 chromablades split between all enemies. Each blade deals 50% physical damage.

Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

cot_loi.name: Bunny Prime Ballista
cot_loi.description:
Gain Precision.

Every 3 critical strikes, fire 6 piercing arrows that can critically strike towards the target. Each deals 100% physical damage.

On takedown, fire a burst of 12 arrows from the target.


Max 3 stacks per Ability cast.
Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman or Fighter

cot_loi.name: Leonine Lamentation
cot_loi.description:
Every 15% max health lost, fire crescent projectiles in 3 lines dealing physical damage equal to 50% of the holder's Armor and Magic Resist. Steal 10 Armor and Magic Resist from all enemies hit.

Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

cot_loi.name: Omniweapon
cot_loi.description: The pinnacle of Anima technology.

an.name: Stargazer Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Stargazer trait.

an.name: Voyager Emblem
an.description:
The holder gains the Voyager trait.

Combat Start: The holder and allies within 1 hex in the same row gain a bonus based on the holder's role.
- Tanks: 10 Armor and Magic Resist
- Fighters/Assassins: 10% Omnivamp
- Other Roles: 10% Attack Speed

an.name: Space Groove Emblem
an.description:
The holder gains the Space Groove trait. On cast, the holder enters for 2.5 seconds.

Can only occur once every 4 seconds.

an.name: Challenger Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Challenger trait. On takedown, the holder's next 3 attacks each heal for 5% of max health.

an.name: Dark Star Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Dark Star trait.

an.name: N.O.V.A. Emblem
an.description:
The holder gains the N.O.V.A. trait.

N.O.V.A. Strike: Gain 25% Attack Speed and 10 Armor and Magic Resist. Other allies gain 10% Attack Speed and 10 Armor and Magic Resist.

an.name: Meeple Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Meeple trait and 4% Damage Amp and 50 Health per .

an.name: Brawler Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Brawler trait. Attacks deals 3% of the holder's max health as magic damage.

an.name: Vanguard Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Vanguard trait. Gain 2% Ability Power whenever an ally gains a shield.

an.name: Bastion Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Bastion trait. After the first 10 seconds of combat, the holder gains 70% Attack Speed.

an.name: Timebreaker Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Timebreaker trait.

an.name: Rogue Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Rogue trait. At 50% health, gain 25% Omnivamp and immunity to crowd control for 5 seconds.

an.name: Shepherd Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Shepherd trait. On cast, grant 8% of max Mana to the Bond of the Stars.

an.name: Marauder Emblem
an.description:
The holder gains the Marauder trait and has a 33% chance to drop 1 gold on kill.

Gold dropped this game:

an.name: Sniper Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Sniper trait and +1 Attack Range.

an.name: Psionic Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Psionic trait.

an.name: Arbiter Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Arbiter trait.

an.name: Anima Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Anima trait.

an.name: Primordian Emblem
an.description: The holder gains the Primordian trait.
